TaskDescription: [visual P300 BCI] compare P300-based BCI with and without adaptive calibration using Riemannian geometry; randomised order of runs (adaptive vs non-adaptive)
Instructions: destroy targets in Brain Invaders BCI video game
InstitutionName: GIPSA-lab, CNRS, University Grenoble-Alpes, Grenoble INP

Description: EEG recordings of 24 subjects doing a visual P300 Brain-Computer Interface experiment comparing adaptive vs non-adaptive calibration using Riemannian geometry
